login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to your PORTTRACK workspace
login.methodLabel: How do you want to sign in?
login.methodCodeHint: You'll get a code to type back
login.methodLinkHint: You'll click the link in the email
login.codeSentDescription: A 6-digit code was sent to {email}. Enter it below to sign in.
login.linkSentDescription: A magic link was sent to {email}. Click it from your inbox to sign in.

import.title: Multi-shipping-line Excel import
import.desc: Load the Excel file received from your shipping agent. Columns are recognised and the mapping is remembered automatically.

transport.title: Assignment, deliveries & EIR
transport.desc: Link each container to a truck and a driver, all the way to delivery confirmed with the archived EIR.

fleet.title: Fleet, documents & alerts
fleet.desc: Vehicle papers scanned and tracked; WhatsApp and email alerts before any expiry or BADT overrun.

driver.title: Driver app & WhatsApp bot
driver.desc: Assignment, checklist and delivery on the driver's phone; documents available in 5 seconds over WhatsApp.
